global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a central product placeholder and clear promotional messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time discount on a product.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Empty product placeholder
elements.description: A simple outline of a product, resembling a smartphone or tablet, is centered in the ad, indicating a product display.

elements.label: Discount announcement
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Up to 40% off Only this weekend' is prominently displayed in the center, conveying urgency.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Only this weekend

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text '€9.99 Learn more' is positioned at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'LuxShelf' is displayed in a bold font at the top, establishing brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, discount announcement, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the product placeholder is centered, the headline is below the product, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Up to 40% off Only this weekend, €9.99 Learn more, LuxShelf
